vocab.meaning: sự ngẫu hứng không gò bó
vocab.example: What I loved most about my childhood was the unstructured spontaneity of our games, where a simple cardboard box could become a fortress.
I possessed an insatiable thirst for discovery, often spent my afternoons poking around the rock pools at the local beach.

vocab.meaning: sự khéo léo/nhạy bén về nhận thức
vocab.example: Puzzles and riddles were my go-to activities as they challenged my cognitive dexterity and kept me occupied for hours.
Much of my early years involved imitative play, where my friends and I would pretend to be doctors or teachers to mirror the adult world.

vocab.meaning: sự thành thạo về kỹ thuật
vocab.example: I took great pride in developing technical proficiency with my remote-controlled planes, navigating them through the trickiest garden obstacles.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn cho những suy nghĩ/không gian riêng tư
vocab.example: My treehouse wasn't just a place to play; it was a sanctuary for thought where I could escape the hustle and bustle of family life.

vocab.meaning: là một người ham học hỏi
vocab.example: Being a voracious learner, I spent countless hours in the attic leafing through old encyclopedias and National Geographic magazines.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phục hồi cảm giác/sự kiên cường
vocab.example: Participating in competitive team sports during middle school taught me emotional resilience and how to handle defeat gracefully.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Building intricate sandcastles helped me hone my spatial awareness, even though they were eventually washed away by the tide.

vocab.meaning: một niềm mê hoặc mãnh liệt/lâu dài với
vocab.example: I've always had an enduring fascination with local folklore, which stemmed from the storytelling sessions we had around the campfire.
